svg.font-family: Segoe UI, system-ui, -apple-system, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: AppNova React Frontend - Architecture Infographic
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram: Entry point, App shell, Global context state, Views, Components, Services, Transport (Axios/SSE), and FastAPI backend with 13 AI agents.
svg.text: IDE-style single-page app for legacy code analysis & modernization · React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind

g.text: • Opens EventSource on /api/logs/stream (live backend logs → DevTools)
• Auto-reconnects every 3 s if backend restarts
• <AppContent> = Activity bar · Sidebar · Tab strip · Editor · Chat dock
• Tab-based routing: dashboard · analysis · <agent-id> · convert · diff
• Session recovery via /api/active-session + spectator SSE on mount
runAnalysis() · runSingleAgent() · resumeAnalysis() · cancelAnalysis() · startConversion() · appendReportChatMessage()
All streaming actions are async generators yielding typed SSE event objects
architecture · code-analysis · code-generation · business-rules · security · devops · documentation · testing · data-migration · ui-ux · integration · migration-planner · code-review
Monaco Editor · Mermaid · react-markdown · remark-gfm · react-syntax-highlighter (Prism)
Axios (request/response) · Fetch + ReadableStream + EventSource (Server-Sent Events for live streaming)
Multi-tab safe: re-attach to live SSE
Report chat auto-routes: refine · ask · run

svg.text: AppNova v2 · React 18 + TS + Vite 8 + Tailwind 4 · © 2026
